context: Tests whether the agent produces a well-formed Objective section with all three required components: Primary KPI (with specific metric and numeric target), Secondary KPI (with specific metric and threshold), and Success threshold (with explicit conditions for both scaling up and killing the campaign).

checklist.name: Primary KPI — named metric
checklist.description: Primary KPI field names a specific KPI type (e.g., subscriptions, CPA, ROAS, CPL) — not a vague goal like 'drive growth'

checklist.name: Primary KPI — numeric target
checklist.description: Primary KPI field includes a specific numeric target (e.g., CPA < $X, ROAS > 2.0, subscriptions = N/month)

checklist.name: Secondary KPI — different metric
checklist.description: Secondary KPI field names a different metric from the Primary KPI (e.g., CTR %, CPM, frequency cap)

checklist.name: Secondary KPI — numeric threshold
checklist.description: Secondary KPI field includes a specific numeric threshold (e.g., CTR > 1.5%, frequency capped at 3)

checklist.name: Success threshold — when to scale
checklist.description: Success threshold field explicitly states a condition under which the campaign should be scaled up (e.g., 'scale when CPA < $X for 7 consecutive days')

checklist.name: Success threshold — when to kill
checklist.description: Success threshold field explicitly states a condition under which the campaign or ad set should be paused or stopped (e.g., 'kill if CPA > $X after $Y spent')

checklist.name: Objective section structure
checklist.description: Objective section has all three labeled fields as separate bullet points: Primary KPI, Secondary KPI, and Success threshold — not combined into one paragraph

checklist.name: Output file saved
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/runbox-launch.md or equivalent vault path

checklist.name: Complete brief structure
checklist.description: Brief contains at least 8 of the 13 required top-level sections
